seoTitle: Lumi Customizable - Personalized Astronomical Telescope | La 3ème dimension
seoDescription: Lumi Customizable: the educational astronomical telescope with your first name engraved on the blue tube. A unique gift made in France, to assemble yourself.
seoKeywords: personalized astronomical telescope, engraved name telescope, original astronomy gift, customizable astronomy kit, 3D printed telescope, astronomy toulouse, unique educational telescope

structuredData.name: Lumi Customizable - Personalized Astronomical Telescope
structuredData.description: Educational astronomical telescope with the recipient's first name engraved on the blue tube. A unique and memorable gift, made in France.
features: Moon, planets and star clusters observation

data.title: Lumi Customizable
data.description: The Lumi you know, with the recipient's first name engraved on the blue tube. A unique astronomical gift, handmade in France.

features.text: Name or logo engraved on the tube

features.title: A name or logo engraved forever
features.description: The recipient's first name or logo is inscribed on the blue tube of the telescope. For a logo, provide an SVG file — depending on the level of detail, some adaptation may be required.

features.title: The perfect astronomy gift
features.description: Give a truly unique telescope — for a birthday, Christmas, or simply to pass on a passion for the sky.

features.title: Same optical quality
features.description: Same lenses, same mechanics, same intuitive assembly as the standard Lumi — just more memorable.

features.title: Made in France
features.description: Handcrafted 3D printing in Toulouse. Every part is made to order.

specs.Customization: First name engraved on the blue tube

data.title: Filter holder included
data.description: The Lumi Customizable pack includes a filter holder compatible with standard 1.25" filters. You can install different types of filters according to your observation needs: moon filter to reduce glare when observing the Moon, or UHC filter to enhance nebula contrast for example.

heroImage.alt: Filter holder for the Lumi telescope

data.title: Lumi Customizable Kit
data.priceNote: Assembly kit + first name engraved on the blue tube
included: First name engraved on the blue tube
data.afterCtaNote: Please specify the name to engrave in your message, or attach your logo as an SVG file. Depending on the level of detail, some modification may be required beforehand. As each part is handcrafted, please allow approximately 20 days for manufacturing, plus shipping time.
